---
title: "Papers"
---

## 2022

**[Hardware-in-the-Loop Simulation, Control, and Validation of Battery Inverter Characteristics Through the IBR Control Hardware](https://wprcarchives.org/wp-content/uploads/2024/04/Magnago_Henrique_HardwareLoopSimulation_FC_20220909.pdf)**
D. Nobles, et al. Presented at the Western Protective Relay Conference, 2022.
